config.creditos_github_desc: Check out the repository, open issues or contribute to the project.
config.creditos_agradecimento: Creator and developer of this project. Thank you for using and supporting!
config.creditos_dedicacao: Made with dedication to make cryptography simple and powerful.
config.creditos_sobre_desc: Multi-step cryptography and encoding tool, with a modern interface, optimized for performance and productivity.

aviso.texto: Some algorithms such as Caesar and Vigenère have limitations with accented characters and certain special characters. SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, and their HMAC variants are hash functions and cannot be reversed, meaning the original text cannot be recovered after their application. Morse code does not distinguish between uppercase and lowercase letters and therefore should not be mixed with other encryption or encoding methods, as this may cause information loss or unexpected results.

chave.dica: The key can be a password or any text.
chave.apenas_bloco_desc: The key will be used only in this block.
chave.todos_tipo_desc: The key will be applied to all blocks of the same type.
chave.todos_com_chave_desc: The key will be applied to all blocks that require a key.

rsa.cole_chave: Paste the private key (PEM or Base64 PKCS#8)
rsa.import_failed: Failed to import the private key.

erro.rsa_publica_invalida: [RSA Error] Invalid or missing public key.
erro.rsa_falha_criptografia: [RSA Error] Encryption failed. Check the public key.
erro.rsa_privada_nao_encontrada: [RSA Error] Private key not found in this block.
erro.rsa_falha_descriptografia: [RSA Error] Decryption failed. Incorrect key or corrupted data.
erro.rsa_importar_vazio: Paste a private key before confirming.
erro.rsa_importar_interpretar: The provided key could not be interpreted.
erro.rsa_importar_base64: Invalid Base64 key. Make sure you copied the entire content.
erro.rsa_importar_formato: Invalid format or incompatible RSA key (expected PKCS#8).
erro.rsa_importar_derivar: Unable to derive the public key from the private key.
erro.chave_obrigatoria: [Error] This block requires a key to continue.

salvar_arquivo.subtitulo: Select what you want to save:
salvar_arquivo.opcao_caminho_chave_texto: Saves the path, key and text.
salvar_arquivo.opcao_caminho_chave_desc: Saves only the path and the key.
salvar_arquivo.opcao_caminho_texto_desc: Saves only the path and the text.
salvar_arquivo.opcao_chave_texto_desc: Saves only the key and the text.
salvar_arquivo.sobrescrever_desc: Replaces it if the file already exists.
salvar_arquivo.criptografar_desc: Protects the file with a password.
